name: bulbasaur
pokedexEntry: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this POKéMON.

name: ivysaur
pokedexEntry: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

name: venusaur
pokedexEntry: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: charmander
pokedexEntry: Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: charmeleon
pokedexEntry: When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels.

name: charizard
pokedexEntry: It is said that Charizard’s fire burns hotter if it has experienced harsh battles.

name: squirtle
pokedexEntry: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

name: wartortle
pokedexEntry: Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance.

name: blastoise
pokedexEntry: A brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.

name: caterpie
pokedexEntry: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

name: metapod
pokedexEntry: This POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.

name: butterfree
pokedexEntry: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

name: weedle
pokedexEntry: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head.

name: kakuna
pokedexEntry: Almost incapable of moving, this POKéMON can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.

name: beedrill
pokedexEntry: Flies at high speed and attacks using its large venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail.

name: pidgey
pokedexEntry: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

name: pidgeotto
pokedexEntry: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this POKéMON will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: pidgeot
pokedexEntry: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as MAGIKARP.

name: rattata
pokedexEntry: Living wherever there is food available, it ceaselessly scav­ enges for edibles the entire day.

name: raticate
pokedexEntry: It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.

name: spearow
pokedexEntry: Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne.

name: fearow
pokedexEntry: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.

name: ekans
pokedexEntry: Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as PIDGEY and SPEAROW, whole.

name: arbok
pokedexEntry: It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.

name: pikachu
pokedexEntry: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.

name: raichu
pokedexEntry: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high voltage power.

name: sandshrew
pokedexEntry: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

name: sandslash
pokedexEntry: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.

name: nidoran-f
pokedexEntry: Although small, its venomous barbs render this POKéMON dangerous. The female has smaller horns.

name: nidorina
pokedexEntry: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.

name: nidoqueen
pokedexEntry: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.

name: nidoran-m
pokedexEntry: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom.

name: nidorino
pokedexEntry: An aggressive POKéMON that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.

name: nidoking
pokedexEntry: It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones.

name: clefairy
pokedexEntry: Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.

name: clefable
pokedexEntry: A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: vulpix
pokedexEntry: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.

name: ninetales
pokedexEntry: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.

name: jigglypuff
pokedexEntry: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: wigglytuff
pokedexEntry: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.

name: zubat
pokedexEntry: It has no eyes. Instead, it relies on its ultrasonic cries for echolocation to flit about in darkness.

name: golbat
pokedexEntry: Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.

name: oddish
pokedexEntry: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.

name: gloom
pokedexEntry: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.

name: vileplume
pokedexEntry: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

name: paras
pokedexEntry: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by draw­ ing nutrients from the bug host.

name: parasect
pokedexEntry: It stays mostly in dark, damp places, the preference not of the bug, but of the big mush­ rooms on its back.

name: venonat
pokedexEntry: Its big eyes are actually clusters of tiny eyes. At night, its kind is drawn by light.

name: venomoth
pokedexEntry: The dust-like scales covering its wings are color coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has.

name: diglett
pokedexEntry: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.

name: dugtrio
pokedexEntry: A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

name: meowth
pokedexEntry: Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

name: persian
pokedexEntry: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

name: psyduck
pokedexEntry: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily POKéMON will use psychokinetic powers.

name: golduck
pokedexEntry: Often seen swim­ ming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa.

name: mankey
pokedexEntry: Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant.

name: primeape
pokedexEntry: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught.

name: growlithe
pokedexEntry: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

name: arcanine
pokedexEntry: A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.

name: poliwag
pokedexEntry: Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand.

name: poliwhirl
pokedexEntry: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.

name: poliwrath
pokedexEntry: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breast stroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.

name: abra
pokedexEntry: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.

name: kadabra
pokedexEntry: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.

name: alakazam
pokedexEntry: Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.

name: machop
pokedexEntry: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.

name: machoke
pokedexEntry: It happily carries heavy cargo to toughen up. It willingly does hard work for people.

name: machamp
pokedexEntry: Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon.

name: bellsprout
pokedexEntry: A carnivorous POKéMON that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.

name: weepinbell
pokedexEntry: A Pokémon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder.

name: victreebel
pokedexEntry: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

name: tentacool
pokedexEntry: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid.

name: tentacruel
pokedexEntry: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.

name: geodude
pokedexEntry: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.

name: graveler
pokedexEntry: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.

name: golem
pokedexEntry: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.

name: ponyta
pokedexEntry: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.

name: rapidash
pokedexEntry: Very competitive, this POKéMON will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.

name: slowpoke
pokedexEntry: It is always so absent-minded that it won't react, even if its flavorful tail is bitten.

name: slowbro
pokedexEntry: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.

name: magnemite
pokedexEntry: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses THUNDER WAVE and similar moves.

name: magneton
pokedexEntry: Formed by several MAGNEMITEs linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.

name: farfetchd
pokedexEntry: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword.

name: doduo
pokedexEntry: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.

name: dodrio
pokedexEntry: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake.

name: seel
pokedexEntry: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.

name: dewgong
pokedexEntry: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.

name: grimer
pokedexEntry: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

name: muk
pokedexEntry: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

name: shellder
pokedexEntry: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.

name: cloyster
pokedexEntry: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen.

name: gastly
pokedexEntry: Almost invisible, this gaseous POKéMON cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

name: haunter
pokedexEntry: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from an­ other dimension.

name: gengar
pokedexEntry: Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.

name: onix
pokedexEntry: It burrows through the ground at a speed of 50 mph while feeding on large boulders.

name: drowzee
pokedexEntry: Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams.

name: hypno
pokedexEntry: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of PSI moves such as HYPNOSIS and CONFUSION.

name: krabby
pokedexEntry: Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways.

name: kingler
pokedexEntry: The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use.

name: voltorb
pokedexEntry: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a POKé BALL, they have zapped many people.

name: electrode
pokedexEntry: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

name: exeggcute
pokedexEntry: Using telepathy only they can receive, they always form a cluster of six EXEGGCUTE.

name: exeggutor
pokedexEntry: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.

name: cubone
pokedexEntry: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this POKéMON's real face.

name: marowak
pokedexEntry: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.

name: hitmonlee
pokedexEntry: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.

name: hitmonchan
pokedexEntry: The arm-twisting punches it throws pulverize even concrete. It rests after three minutes of fighting.

name: lickitung
pokedexEntry: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies.

name: koffing
pokedexEntry: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.

name: weezing
pokedexEntry: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.

name: rhyhorn
pokedexEntry: Its massive bones are 1000 times harder than human bones. It can easily knock a trailer flying.

name: rhydon
pokedexEntry: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees.

name: chansey
pokedexEntry: A rare and elusive POKéMON that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it.

name: tangela
pokedexEntry: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to sea­ weed. Its vines shake as it walks.

name: kangaskhan
pokedexEntry: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old.

name: horsea
pokedexEntry: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.

name: seadra
pokedexEntry: Capable of swim­ ming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail.

name: goldeen
pokedexEntry: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen.

name: seaking
pokedexEntry: In autumn, its body becomes more fatty in preparing to propose to a mate. It takes on beautiful colors.

name: staryu
pokedexEntry: An enigmatic POKéMON that can effortlessly regenerate any appendage it loses in battle.

name: starmie
pokedexEntry: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.

name: mr-mime
pokedexEntry: If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.

name: scyther
pokedexEntry: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.

name: jynx
pokedexEntry: It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

name: electabuzz
pokedexEntry: Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.

name: magmar
pokedexEntry: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.

name: pinsir
pokedexEntry: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard.

name: tauros
pokedexEntry: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

name: magikarp
pokedexEntry: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

name: gyarados
pokedexEntry: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

name: lapras
pokedexEntry: A POKéMON that has been over­ hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.

name: ditto
pokedexEntry: When it spots an enemy, its body transfigures into an almost-perfect copy of its opponent.

name: eevee
pokedexEntry: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.

name: vaporeon
pokedexEntry: Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.

name: jolteon
pokedexEntry: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000- volt lightning bolts.

name: flareon
pokedexEntry: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.

name: porygon
pokedexEntry: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

name: omanyte
pokedexEntry: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils.

name: omastar
pokedexEntry: A prehistoric POKéMON that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey.

name: kabuto
pokedexEntry: A POKéMON that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.

name: kabutops
pokedexEntry: Kabutops slices its prey apart and sucks out the fluids. The discarded body parts become food for other Pokémon.

name: aerodactyl
pokedexEntry: A ferocious, pre­ historic POKéMON that goes for the enemy's throat with its serrated saw-like fangs.

name: snorlax
pokedexEntry: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.

name: articuno
pokedexEntry: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

name: zapdos
pokedexEntry: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.

name: moltres
pokedexEntry: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

name: dratini
pokedexEntry: Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.

name: dragonair
pokedexEntry: A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.

name: dragonite
pokedexEntry: An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.

name: mewtwo
pokedexEntry: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

name: mew
pokedexEntry: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

name: chikorita
pokedexEntry: It uses the leaf on its head to determine the temperature and humidity. It loves to sunbathe.

name: bayleef
pokedexEntry: The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.

name: meganium
pokedexEntry: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.

name: cyndaquil
pokedexEntry: It is timid, and always curls it­ self up in a ball. If attacked, it flares up its back for protection.

name: quilava
pokedexEntry: Be careful if it turns its back during battle. It means that it will attack with the fire on its back.

name: typhlosion
pokedexEntry: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.

name: totodile
pokedexEntry: Its well-developed jaws are powerful and capable of crushing anything. Even its trainer must be careful.

name: croconaw
pokedexEntry: If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth.

name: feraligatr
pokedexEntry: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.

name: sentret
pokedexEntry: It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.

name: furret
pokedexEntry: It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other POKéMON to enter.

name: hoothoot
pokedexEntry: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.

name: noctowl
pokedexEntry: Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark.

name: ledyba
pokedexEntry: It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.

name: ledian
pokedexEntry: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.

name: spinarak
pokedexEntry: It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close.

name: ariados
pokedexEntry: It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It is hard to tell which end is which.

name: crobat
pokedexEntry: Having four wings allows it to fly more quickly and quietly so it can sneak up on prey without its noticing.

name: chinchou
pokedexEntry: It shoots positive and negative elec­ tricity between the tips of its two antennae and zaps its enemies.

name: lanturn
pokedexEntry: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles.

name: pichu
pokedexEntry: It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled.

name: cleffa
pokedexEntry: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

name: igglybuff
pokedexEntry: It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.

name: togepi
pokedexEntry: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.

name: togetic
pokedexEntry: To share its happiness, it flies around the world seeking kind- hearted people.

name: natu
pokedexEntry: Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always star­ ing at something.

name: xatu
pokedexEntry: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.

name: mareep
pokedexEntry: If static elec­ tricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.

name: flaaffy
pokedexEntry: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won't grow.

name: ampharos
pokedexEntry: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.

name: bellossom
pokedexEntry: BELLOSSOM gather at times and appear to dance. They say that the dance is a ritual to summon the sun.

name: marill
pokedexEntry: The tip of its tail, which con­ tains oil that is lighter than wa­ ter, lets it swim without drowning.

name: azumarill
pokedexEntry: By keeping still and listening in­ tently, it can tell what is in even wild, fast- moving rivers.

name: sudowoodo
pokedexEntry: Despite appearing to be a tree, its body is closer to rocks and stones. It is very weak to water.

name: politoed
pokedexEntry: If POLIWAG and POLIWHIRL hear its echoing cry, they respond by gather­ ing from far and wide.

name: hoppip
pokedexEntry: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.

name: skiploom
pokedexEntry: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluc­ tuates up and down.

name: jumpluff
pokedexEntry: Blown by seasonal winds, it circles the globe, scattering cotton spores as it goes.

name: aipom
pokedexEntry: Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air.

name: sunkern
pokedexEntry: It may drop out of the sky suddenly. If attacked by a SPEAROW, it will violently shake its leaves.

name: sunflora
pokedexEntry: It converts sun­ light into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.

name: yanma
pokedexEntry: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter win­ dows in the area.

name: wooper
pokedexEntry: This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.

name: quagsire
pokedexEntry: This carefree POKéMON has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.

name: espeon
pokedexEntry: Its fur is so sensitive, it can sense minute shifts in the air and predict the weather.

name: umbreon
pokedexEntry: When agitated, this POKéMON pro­ tects itself by spraying poisonous sweat from its pores.

name: murkrow
pokedexEntry: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

name: slowking
pokedexEntry: It has incredible intellect and in­ tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.

name: misdreavus
pokedexEntry: It likes playing mischievous tricks such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night.

name: unown
pokedexEntry: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tab­ lets. It is said that the two are somehow related.

name: wobbuffet
pokedexEntry: It hates light and shock. If attack­ ed, it inflates its body to pump up its counter­ strike.

name: girafarig
pokedexEntry: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent and bite.

name: pineco
pokedexEntry: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it.

name: forretress
pokedexEntry: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside the armor is a total mystery.

name: dunsparce
pokedexEntry: When spotted, this POKéMON escapes backward by furi­ ously boring into the ground with its tail.

name: gligar
pokedexEntry: It flies straight at its target's face then clamps down on the star­ tled victim to inject poison.

name: steelix
pokedexEntry: Its body has been compressed deep under the ground. As a result, it is even harder than a diamond.

name: snubbull
pokedexEntry: Although it looks frightening, it is actually kind and affectionate. It is very popular among women.

name: granbull
pokedexEntry: It is actually timid and easily spooked. If at­ tacked, it flails about to fend off its attacker.

name: qwilfish
pokedexEntry: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.

name: scizor
pokedexEntry: It swings its eye- patterned pincers up to scare its foes. This makes it look like it has three heads.

name: shuckle
pokedexEntry: The BERRIES it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.

name: heracross
pokedexEntry: This powerful POKéMON thrusts its prized horn under its enemies’ bellies then lifts and throws them.

name: sneasel
pokedexEntry: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud­ denly extends the claws and startles its enemy.

name: teddiursa
pokedexEntry: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they are soaked with honey.

name: ursaring
pokedexEntry: Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap trees with its forelegs and eat fallen BERRIES.

name: slugma
pokedexEntry: Its body is made of magma. If it doesn’t keep moving, its body will cool and harden.

name: magcargo
pokedexEntry: The shell on its back is just skin that has cooled and hardened. It breaks easily with a slight touch.

name: swinub
pokedexEntry: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.

name: piloswine
pokedexEntry: Although its legs are short, its rugged hooves prevent it from slipping, even on icy ground.

name: corsola
pokedexEntry: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.

name: remoraid
pokedexEntry: It has superb ac­ curacy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 300 feet.

name: octillery
pokedexEntry: It traps enemies with its suction- cupped tentacles then smashes them with its rock-hard head.

name: delibird
pokedexEntry: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.

name: mantine
pokedexEntry: As it majestically swims, it doesn't care if REMORAID attach to it for scavenging its leftovers.

name: skarmory
pokedexEntry: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.

name: houndour
pokedexEntry: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey.

name: houndoom
pokedexEntry: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.

name: kingdra
pokedexEntry: It is said that it usually hides in underwater caves. It can create whirlpools by yawning.

name: phanpy
pokedexEntry: It swings its long snout around play­ fully, but because it is so strong, that can be dan­ gerous.

name: donphan
pokedexEntry: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its TACKLE is strong enough to knock down a house.

name: porygon2
pokedexEntry: This upgraded version of PORYGON is designed for space exploration. It can't fly, though.

name: stantler
pokedexEntry: The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where real­ ity is distorted.

name: smeargle
pokedexEntry: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.

name: tyrogue
pokedexEntry: It is always bursting with en­ ergy. To make it­ self stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.

name: hitmontop
pokedexEntry: If you become enchanted by its smooth, elegant, dance-like kicks, you may get drilled hard.

name: smoochum
pokedexEntry: Its lips are the most sensitive parts on its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.

name: elekid
pokedexEntry: It rotates its arms to generate electricity, but it tires easily, so it charges up only a little bit.

name: magby
pokedexEntry: Each and every time it inhales and exhales, hot embers dribble out of its mouth and nostrils.

name: miltank
pokedexEntry: Its milk is packed with nutrition, making it the ultimate beverage for the sick or weary.

name: blissey
pokedexEntry: Anyone who takes even one bite of BLISSEY's egg be­ comes unfailingly caring and pleas­ ant to everyone.

name: raikou
pokedexEntry: The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say that it descended with lightning.

name: entei
pokedexEntry: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Un­ able to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land.

name: suicune
pokedexEntry: Said to be the reincarnation of north winds, it can instantly purify filthy, murky water.

name: larvitar
pokedexEntry: It feeds on soil. After it has eaten a large mountain, it will fall asleep so it can grow.

name: pupitar
pokedexEntry: Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its THRASHING can topple a mountain.

name: tyranitar
pokedexEntry: Its body can't be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.

name: lugia
pokedexEntry: It is said that it quietly spends its time deep at the bottom of the sea because its powers are too strong.

name: ho-oh
pokedexEntry: Legends claim this POKéMON flies the world's skies con­ tinuously on its magnificent seven- colored wings.

name: celebi
pokedexEntry: This POKéMON wan­ ders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared.

name: treecko
pokedexEntry: TREECKO has small hooks on the bottom of its feet that enable it to scale vertical walls. This POKéMON attacks by slamming foes with its thick tail.

name: grovyle
pokedexEntry: The leaves growing out of GROVYLE’s body are convenient for camouflaging it from enemies in the forest. This POKéMON is a master at climbing trees in jungles.

name: sceptile
pokedexEntry: The leaves growing on SCEPTILE’s body are very sharp edged. This POKéMON is very agile - it leaps all over the branches of trees and jumps on its foe from above or behind.

name: torchic
pokedexEntry: TORCHIC sticks with its TRAINER, following behind with unsteady steps. This POKéMON breathes fire of over 1,800 degrees F, including fireballs that leave the foe scorched black.

name: combusken
pokedexEntry: COMBUSKEN toughens up its legs and thighs by running through fields and mountains. This POKéMON’s legs possess both speed and power, enabling it to dole out ten kicks in one second.

name: blaziken
pokedexEntry: Flames spout from its wrists, enveloping its knuckles. Its punches scorch its foes.

name: mudkip
pokedexEntry: The fin on MUDKIP’s head acts as highly sensitive radar. Using this fin to sense movements of water and air, this POKéMON can determine what is taking place around it without using its eyes.

name: marshtomp
pokedexEntry: The surface of MARSHTOMP’s body is enveloped by a thin, sticky film that enables it to live on land. This POKéMON plays in mud on beaches when the ocean tide is low.

name: swampert
pokedexEntry: SWAMPERT is very strong. It has enough power to easily drag a boulder weighing more than a ton. This POKéMON also has powerful vision that lets it see even in murky water.

name: poochyena
pokedexEntry: At first sight, POOCHYENA takes a bite at anything that moves. This POKéMON chases after prey until the victim becomes exhausted. However, it may turn tail if the prey strikes back.

name: mightyena
pokedexEntry: It chases down prey in a pack. It will never disobey the commands of a skilled Trainer.

name: zigzagoon
pokedexEntry: ZIGZAGOON restlessly wanders everywhere at all times. This POKéMON does so because it is very curious. It becomes interested in anything that it happens to see.

name: linoone
pokedexEntry: LINOONE always runs full speed and only in straight lines. If facing an obstacle, it makes a right-angle turn to evade it. This POKéMON is very challenged by gently curving roads.

name: wurmple
pokedexEntry: Using the spikes on its rear end, WURMPLE peels the bark off trees and feeds on the sap that oozes out. This POKéMON’s feet are tipped with suction pads that allow it to cling to glass without slipping.

name: silcoon
pokedexEntry: SILCOON tethers itself to a tree branch using silk to keep from falling. There, this POKéMON hangs quietly while it awaits evolution. It peers out of the silk cocoon through a small hole.

name: beautifly
pokedexEntry: BEAUTIFLY’s favorite food is the sweet pollen of flowers. If you want to see this POKéMON, just leave a potted flower by an open window. BEAUTIFLY is sure to come looking for pollen.

name: cascoon
pokedexEntry: CASCOON makes its protective cocoon by wrapping its body entirely with a fine silk from its mouth. Once the silk goes around its body, it hardens. This POKéMON prepares for its evolution inside the cocoon.

name: dustox
pokedexEntry: DUSTOX is instinctively drawn to light. Swarms of this POKéMON are attracted by the bright lights of cities, where they wreak havoc by stripping the leaves off roadside trees for food.

name: lotad
pokedexEntry: LOTAD live in ponds and lakes, where they float on the surface. It grows weak if its broad leaf dies. On rare occasions, this POKéMON travels on land in search of clean water.

name: lombre
pokedexEntry: LOMBRE is nocturnal - it will get active after dusk. It is also a mischief-maker. When this POKéMON spots anglers, it tugs on their fishing lines from beneath the surface and enjoys their consternation.

name: ludicolo
pokedexEntry: LUDICOLO begins dancing as soon as it hears cheerful, festive music. This POKéMON is said to appear when it hears the singing of children on hiking outings.

name: seedot
pokedexEntry: SEEDOT attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. It sucks moisture from the tree while hanging off the branch. The more water it drinks, the glossier this POKéMON’s body becomes.

name: nuzleaf
pokedexEntry: NUZLEAF live in densely overgrown forests. They occasionally venture out of the forest to startle people. This POKéMON dislikes having its long nose pinched.

name: shiftry
pokedexEntry: SHIFTRY is a mysterious POKéMON that is said to live atop towering trees dating back over a thousand years. It creates terrific windstorms with the fans it holds.

name: taillow
pokedexEntry: TAILLOW courageously stands its ground against foes, however strong they may be. This gutsy POKéMON will remain defiant even after a loss. On the other hand, it cries loudly if it becomes hungry.

name: swellow
pokedexEntry: SWELLOW flies high above our heads, making graceful arcs in the sky. This POKéMON dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its prey. The hapless prey is tightly grasped by SWELLOW’s clawed feet, preventing escape.

name: wingull
pokedexEntry: WINGULL has the habit of carrying prey and valuables in its beak and hiding them in all sorts of locations. This POKéMON rides the winds and flies as if it were skating across the sky.

name: pelipper
pokedexEntry: PELIPPER is a flying transporter that carries small POKéMON and eggs inside its massive bill. This POKéMON builds its nest on steep cliffs facing the sea.

name: ralts
pokedexEntry: RALTS senses the emotions of people using the horns on its head. This POKéMON rarely appears before people. But when it does, it draws closer if it senses that the person has a positive disposition.

name: kirlia
pokedexEntry: It is said that a KIRLIA that is exposed to the positive emotions of its TRAINER grows beautiful. This POKéMON controls psychokinetic powers with its highly developed brain.

name: gardevoir
pokedexEntry: It unleashes psychokinetic energy at full power when protecting a Trainer it has bonded closely with.

name: surskit
pokedexEntry: From the tips of its feet, SURSKIT secretes an oil that enables it to walk on water as if it were skating. This POKéMON feeds on microscopic organisms in ponds and lakes.

name: masquerain
pokedexEntry: MASQUERAIN intimidates enemies with the eyelike patterns on its antennas. This POKéMON flaps its four wings to freely fly in any direction - even sideways and backwards - as if it were a helicopter.

name: shroomish
pokedexEntry: SHROOMISH live in damp soil in the dark depths of forests. They are often found keeping still under fallen leaves. This POKéMON feeds on compost that is made up of fallen, rotted leaves.

name: breloom
pokedexEntry: BRELOOM closes in on its foe with light and sprightly footwork, then throws punches with its stretchy arms. This POKéMON’s fighting technique puts boxers to shame.

name: slakoth
pokedexEntry: SLAKOTH lolls around for over twenty hours every day. Because it moves so little, it does not need much food. This POKéMON’s sole daily meal consists of just three leaves.

name: vigoroth
pokedexEntry: VIGOROTH is always itching and agitated to go on a wild rampage. It simply can’t tolerate sitting still for even a minute. This POKéMON’s stress level rises if it can’t be moving constantly.

name: slaking
pokedexEntry: SLAKING spends all day lying down and lolling about. It eats grass growing within its reach. If it eats all the grass it can reach, this POKéMON reluctantly moves to another spot.

name: nincada
pokedexEntry: NINCADA lives underground for many years in complete darkness. This POKéMON absorbs nutrients from the roots of trees. It stays motionless as it waits for evolution.

name: ninjask
pokedexEntry: NINJASK moves around at such a high speed that it cannot be seen, even while its crying can be clearly heard. For that reason, this POKéMON was long believed to be invisible.

name: shedinja
pokedexEntry: SHEDINJA’s hard body doesn’t move - not even a twitch. In fact, its body appears to be merely a hollow shell. It is believed that this POKéMON will steal the spirit of anyone peering into its hollow body from its back.

name: whismur
pokedexEntry: Normally, WHISMUR’s voice is very quiet - it is barely audible even if one is paying close attention. However, if this POKéMON senses danger, it starts crying at an earsplitting volume.

name: loudred
pokedexEntry: LOUDRED’s bellowing can completely decimate a wood-frame house. It uses its voice to punish its foes. This POKéMON’s round ears serve as loudspeakers.

name: exploud
pokedexEntry: EXPLOUD triggers earthquakes with the tremors it creates by bellowing. If this POKéMON violently inhales from the ports on its body, it’s a sign that it is preparing to let loose a huge bellow.

name: makuhita
pokedexEntry: MAKUHITA is tenacious - it will keep getting up and attacking its foe however many times it is knocked down. Every time it gets back up, this POKéMON stores more energy in its body for evolving.

name: hariyama
pokedexEntry: HARIYAMA practices its straight-arm slaps in any number of locations. One hit of this POKéMON’s powerful, openhanded, straight-arm punches could snap a telephone pole in two.

name: azurill
pokedexEntry: AZURILL spins its tail as if it were a lasso, then hurls it far. The momentum of the throw sends its body flying, too. Using this unique action, one of these POKéMON managed to hurl itself a record 33 feet.

name: nosepass
pokedexEntry: NOSEPASS’s magnetic nose is always pointed to the north. If two of these POKéMON meet, they cannot turn their faces to each other when they are close because their magnetic noses repel one another.

name: skitty
pokedexEntry: SKITTY has the habit of becoming fascinated by moving objects and chasing them around. This POKéMON is known to chase after its own tail and become dizzy.

name: delcatty
pokedexEntry: DELCATTY prefers to live an unfettered existence in which it can do as it pleases at its own pace. Because this POKéMON eats and sleeps whenever it decides, its daily routines are completely random.

name: sableye
pokedexEntry: SABLEYE lead quiet lives deep inside caverns. They are feared, however, because these POKéMON are thought to steal the spirits of people when their eyes burn with a sinister glow in the darkness.

name: mawile
pokedexEntry: MAWHILE’s huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed. Its docile-looking face serves to lull its foe into letting down its guard. When the foe least expects it, MAWHILE chomps it with its gaping jaws.

name: aron
pokedexEntry: This POKéMON has a body of steel. To make its body, ARON feeds on iron ore that it digs from mountains. Occasionally, it causes major trouble by eating bridges and rails.

name: lairon
pokedexEntry: LAIRON tempers its steel body by drinking highly nutritious mineral springwater until it is bloated. This POKéMON makes its nest close to springs of delicious water.

name: aggron
pokedexEntry: AGGRON claims an entire mountain as its own territory. It mercilessly beats up anything that violates its environment. This POKéMON vigilantly patrols its territory at all times.

name: meditite
pokedexEntry: MEDITITE undertakes rigorous mental training deep in the mountains. However, whenever it meditates, this POKéMON always loses its concentration and focus. As a result, its training never ends.

name: medicham
pokedexEntry: It is said that through meditation, MEDICHAM heightens energy inside its body and sharpens its sixth sense. This POKéMON hides its presence by merging itself with fields and mountains.

name: electrike
pokedexEntry: ELECTRIKE stores electricity in its long body hair. This POKéMON stimulates its leg muscles with electric charges. These jolts of power give its legs explosive acceleration performance.

name: manectric
pokedexEntry: MANECTRIC is constantly discharging electricity from its mane. The sparks sometimes ignite forest fires. When it enters a battle, this POKéMON creates thunderclouds.

name: plusle
pokedexEntry: PLUSLE always acts as a cheerleader for its partners. Whenever a teammate puts out a good effort in battle, this POKéMON shorts out its body to create the crackling noises of sparks to show its joy.

name: minun
pokedexEntry: MINUN is more concerned about cheering on its partners than its own safety. It shorts out the electricity in its body to create brilliant showers of sparks to cheer on its teammates.

name: volbeat
pokedexEntry: With the arrival of night, VOLBEAT emits light from its tail. It communicates with others by adjusting the intensity and flashing of its light. This POKéMON is attracted by the sweet aroma of ILLUMISE.

name: illumise
pokedexEntry: ILLUMISE attracts a swarm of VOLBEAT using a sweet fragrance. Once the VOLBEAT have gathered, this POKéMON leads the lit-up swarm in drawing geometric designs on the canvas of the night sky.

name: roselia
pokedexEntry: ROSELIA shoots sharp thorns as projectiles at any opponent that tries to steal the flowers on its arms. The aroma of this POKéMON brings serenity to living things.

name: gulpin
pokedexEntry: It has a small heart and brain. Its stomach comprises most of its body, with enzymes to dissolve anything.

name: swalot
pokedexEntry: When SWALOT spots prey, it spurts out a hideously toxic fluid from its pores and sprays the target. Once the prey has weakened, this POKéMON gulps it down whole with its cavernous mouth.

name: carvanha
pokedexEntry: CARVANHA’s strongly developed jaws and its sharply pointed fangs pack the destructive power to rip out boat hulls. Many boats have been attacked and sunk by this POKéMON.

name: sharpedo
pokedexEntry: Nicknamed “the bully of the sea,” SHARPEDO is widely feared. Its cruel fangs grow back immediately if they snap off. Just one of these POKéMON can thoroughly tear apart a supertanker.

name: wailmer
pokedexEntry: WAILMER’s nostrils are located above its eyes. This playful POKéMON loves to startle people by forcefully snorting out seawater it stores inside its body out of its nostrils.

name: wailord
pokedexEntry: WAILORD is the largest of all identified POKéMON up to now. This giant POKéMON swims languorously in the vast open sea, eating massive amounts of food at once with its enormous mouth.

name: numel
pokedexEntry: NUMEL is extremely dull witted - it doesn’t notice being hit. However, it can’t stand hunger for even a second. This POKéMON’s body is a seething cauldron of boiling magma.

name: camerupt
pokedexEntry: CAMERUPT has a volcano inside its body. Magma of 18,000 degrees F courses through its body. Occasionally, the humps on this POKéMON’s back erupt, spewing the superheated magma.

name: torkoal
pokedexEntry: TORKOAL digs through mountains in search of coal. If it finds some, it fills hollow spaces on its shell with the coal and burns it. If it is attacked, this POKéMON spouts thick black smoke to beat a retreat.

name: spoink
pokedexEntry: SPOINK bounces around on its tail. The shock of its bouncing makes its heart pump. As a result, this POKéMON cannot afford to stop bouncing - if it stops, its heart will stop.

name: grumpig
pokedexEntry: GRUMPIG uses the black pearls on its body to amplify its psychic power waves for gaining total control over its foe. When this POKéMON uses its special power, its snorting breath grows labored.

name: spinda
pokedexEntry: All the SPINDA that exist in the world are said to have utterly unique spot patterns. The shaky, tottering steps of this POKéMON give it the appearance of dancing.

name: trapinch
pokedexEntry: TRAPINCH’s nest is a sloped, bowl-like pit dug in sand. This POKéMON patiently waits for prey to tumble down the pit. Its giant jaws have enough strength to crush even boulders.

name: vibrava
pokedexEntry: To make prey faint, VIBRAVA generates ultrasonic waves by vigorously making its two wings vibrate. This POKéMON’s ultrasonic waves are so powerful, they can bring on headaches in people.

name: flygon
pokedexEntry: FLYGON is nicknamed “the elemental spirit of the desert.” Because its flapping wings whip up a cloud of sand, this POKéMON is always enveloped in a sandstorm while flying.

name: cacnea
pokedexEntry: CACNEA lives in arid locations such as deserts. It releases a strong aroma from its flower to attract prey. When prey comes near, this POKéMON shoots sharp thorns from its body to bring the victim down.

name: cacturne
pokedexEntry: During the daytime, CACTURNE remains unmoving so that it does not lose any moisture to the harsh desert sun. This POKéMON becomes active at night when the temperature drops.

name: swablu
pokedexEntry: SWABLU has light and fluffy wings that are like cottony clouds. This POKéMON is not frightened of people. It lands on the heads of people and sits there like a cotton-fluff hat.

name: altaria
pokedexEntry: ALTARIA dances and wheels through the sky among billowing, cotton-like clouds. By singing melodies in its crystal-clear voice, this POKéMON makes its listeners experience dreamy wonderment.

name: zangoose
pokedexEntry: It has feuded with Seviper for many generations. Its sharp claws are its biggest weapons.

name: seviper
pokedexEntry: SEVIPER shares a generations-long feud with ZANGOOSE. The scars on its body are evidence of vicious battles. This POKéMON attacks using its sword- edged tail.

name: lunatone
pokedexEntry: LUNATONE was discovered at a location where a meteorite fell. As a result, some people theorize that this POKéMON came from space. However, no one has been able to prove this theory so far.

name: solrock
pokedexEntry: SOLROCK is a new species of POKéMON that is said to have fallen from space. It floats in air and moves silently. In battle, this POKéMON releases intensely bright light.

name: barboach
pokedexEntry: BARBOACH’s sensitive whiskers serve as a superb radar system. This POKéMON hides in mud, leaving only its two whiskers exposed while it waits for prey to come along.

name: whiscash
pokedexEntry: WHISCASH is extremely territorial. Just one of these POKéMON will claim a large pond as its exclusive territory. If a foe approaches it, it thrashes about and triggers a massive earthquake.

name: corphish
pokedexEntry: CORPHISH were originally foreign POKéMON that were imported as pets. They eventually turned up in the wild. This POKéMON is very hardy and has greatly increased its population.

name: crawdaunt
pokedexEntry: CRAWDAUNT has an extremely violent nature that compels it to challenge other living things to battle. Other life-forms refuse to live in ponds inhabited by this POKéMON, making them desolate places.

name: baltoy
pokedexEntry: BALTOY moves while spinning around on its one foot. Primitive wall paintings depicting this POKéMON living among people were discovered in some ancient ruins.

name: claydol
pokedexEntry: CLAYDOL are said to be dolls of mud made by primitive humans and brought to life by exposure to a mysterious ray. This POKéMON moves about while levitating.

name: lileep
pokedexEntry: It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and was reanimated scientifically.

name: cradily
pokedexEntry: CRADILY roams around the ocean floor in search of food. This POKéMON freely extends its tree trunk-like neck and captures unwary prey using its eight tentacles.

name: anorith
pokedexEntry: ANORITH was regenerated from a prehistoric fossil. This primitive POKéMON once lived in warm seas. It grips its prey firmly between its two large claws.

name: armaldo
pokedexEntry: ARMALDO’s tough armor makes all attacks bounce off. This POKéMON’s two enormous claws can be freely extended or contracted. They have the power to punch right through a steel slab.

name: feebas
pokedexEntry: FEEBAS’s fins are ragged and tattered from the start of its life. Because of its shoddy appearance, this POKéMON is largely ignored. It is capable of living in both the sea and in rivers.

name: milotic
pokedexEntry: MILOTIC is breathtakingly beautiful. Those that see it are said to forget their combative spirits.

name: castform
pokedexEntry: CASTFORM’s appearance changes with the weather. This POKéMON gained the ability to use the vast power of nature to protect its tiny body.

name: kecleon
pokedexEntry: KECLEON is capable of changing its body colors at will to blend in with its surroundings. There is one exception - this POKéMON can’t change the zigzag pattern on its belly.

name: shuppet
pokedexEntry: SHUPPET is attracted by feelings of jealousy and vindictiveness. If someone develops strong feelings of vengeance, this POKéMON will appear in a swarm and line up beneath the eaves of that person’s home.

name: banette
pokedexEntry: A doll that became a Pokémon over its grudge from being junked. It seeks the child that disowned it.

name: duskull
pokedexEntry: DUSKULL can pass through any wall no matter how thick it may be. Once this POKéMON chooses a target, it will doggedly pursue the intended victim until the break of dawn.

name: dusclops
pokedexEntry: DUSCLOPS’s body is completely hollow - there is nothing at all inside. It is said that its body is like a black hole. This POKéMON will absorb anything into its body, but nothing will ever come back out.

name: tropius
pokedexEntry: It lives in tropical jungles. The bunch of fruit around its neck is delicious. The fruit grows twice a year.

name: chimecho
pokedexEntry: CHIMECHO makes its cries echo inside its hollow body. When this POKéMON becomes enraged, its cries result in ultrasonic waves that have the power to knock foes flying.

name: absol
pokedexEntry: Every time ABSOL appears before people, it is followed by a disaster such as an earthquake or a tidal wave. As a result, it came to be known as the disaster POKéMON.

name: wynaut
pokedexEntry: WYNAUT can always be seen with a big, happy smile on its face. Look at its tail to determine if it is angry. When angered, this POKéMON will be slapping the ground with its tail.

name: snorunt
pokedexEntry: SNORUNT live in regions with heavy snowfall. In seasons without snow, such as spring and summer, this POKéMON steals away to live quietly among stalactites and stalagmites deep in caverns.

name: glalie
pokedexEntry: GLALIE has a body made of rock, which it hardens with an armor of ice. This POKéMON has the ability to freeze moisture in the atmosphere into any shape it desires.

name: spheal
pokedexEntry: SPHEAL is much faster rolling than walking to get around. When groups of this POKéMON eat, they all clap at once to show their pleasure. Because of this, their mealtimes are noisy.

name: sealeo
pokedexEntry: It has a very sensitive nose. It touches new things with its nose to examine them.

name: walrein
pokedexEntry: WALREIN’s two massively developed tusks can totally shatter blocks of ice weighing ten tons with one blow. This POKéMON’s thick coat of blubber insulates it from subzero temperatures.

name: clamperl
pokedexEntry: CLAMPERL’s sturdy shell is not only good for protection - it is also used for clamping and catching prey. A fully grown CLAMPERL’s shell will be scored with nicks and scratches all over.

name: huntail
pokedexEntry: HUNTAIL’s presence went unnoticed by people for a long time because it lives at extreme depths in the sea. This POKéMON’s eyes can see clearly even in the murky dark depths of the ocean.

name: gorebyss
pokedexEntry: GOREBYSS lives in the southern seas at extreme depths. Its body is built to withstand the enormous pressure of water at incredible depths. Because of this, this POKéMON’s body is unharmed by ordinary attacks.

name: relicanth
pokedexEntry: RELICANTH is a POKéMON species that existed for a hundred million years without ever changing its form. This ancient POKéMON feeds on microscopic organisms with its toothless mouth.

name: luvdisc
pokedexEntry: LUVDISC live in shallow seas in the tropics. This heart-shaped POKéMON earned its name by swimming after loving couples it spotted in the ocean’s waves.

name: bagon
pokedexEntry: BAGON has a dream of one day soaring in the sky. In doomed efforts to fly, this POKéMON hurls itself off cliffs. As a result of its dives, its head has grown tough and as hard as tempered steel.

name: shelgon
pokedexEntry: Inside SHELGON’s armor-like shell, cells are in the midst of transformation to create an entirely new body. This POKéMON’s shell is extremely heavy, making its movements sluggish.

name: salamence
pokedexEntry: SALAMENCE came about as a result of a strong, long-held dream of growing wings. It is said that this powerful desire triggered a sudden mutation in this POKéMON’s cells, causing it to sprout its magnificent wings.

name: beldum
pokedexEntry: It converses with others by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.

name: metang
pokedexEntry: When two BELDUM fuse together, METANG is formed. The brains of the BELDUM are joined by a magnetic nervous system. By linking its brains magnetically, this POKéMON generates strong psychokinetic power.

name: metagross
pokedexEntry: METAGROSS has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer. This POKéMON can float in the air by tucking in its four legs.

name: regirock
pokedexEntry: REGIROCK was sealed away by people long ago. If this POKéMON’s body is damaged in battle, it is said to seek out suitable rocks on its own to repair itself.

name: regice
pokedexEntry: REGICE’s body was made during an ice age. The deep-frozen body can’t be melted, even by fire. This POKéMON controls frigid air of minus 328 degrees F.

name: registeel
pokedexEntry: REGISTEEL has a body that is harder than any kind of metal. Its body is apparently hollow. No one has any idea what this POKéMON eats.

name: latias
pokedexEntry: LATIAS is highly sensitive to the emotions of people. If it senses any hostility, this POKéMON ruffles the feathers all over its body and cries shrilly to intimidate the foe.

name: latios
pokedexEntry: LATIOS has the ability to make its foe see an image of what it has seen or imagines in its head. This POKéMON is intelligent and understands human speech.

name: kyogre
pokedexEntry: KYOGRE has the power to create massive rain clouds that cover the entire sky and bring about torrential downpours. This POKéMON saved people who were suffering from droughts.

name: groudon
pokedexEntry: GROUDON has long been described in mythology as the POKéMON that raised lands and expanded continents. This POKéMON took to sleep after a cataclysmic battle with KYOGRE.

name: rayquaza
pokedexEntry: RAYQUAZA lived for hundreds of millions of years in the earth’s ozone layer, never descending to the ground. This POKéMON appears to feed on water and particles in the atmosphere.

name: jirachi
pokedexEntry: A legend states that JIRACHI will make true any wish that is written on notes attached to its head when it awakens. If this POKéMON senses danger, it will fight without awakening.

name: deoxys-normal
pokedexEntry: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in DEOXYS. The crystalline organ on this POKéMON’s chest appears to be its brain.

name: turtwig
pokedexEntry: Made from soil, the shell on its back hardens when it drinks water. It lives along lakes.

name: grotle
pokedexEntry: A GROTLE that lives in the forest is said to have its own secret springwater.

name: torterra
pokedexEntry: Some Pokémon are born on a Torterra’s back and spend their entire life there.

name: chimchar
pokedexEntry: It agilely scales sheer cliffs to live atop craggy mountains. Its fire is put out when it sleeps.

name: monferno
pokedexEntry: To intimidate attackers, it stretches the fire on its tail to make itself appear bigger.

name: infernape
pokedexEntry: It uses a special kind of martial arts involving all its limbs. Its fire never goes out.

name: piplup
pokedexEntry: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.

name: prinplup
pokedexEntry: It lives alone, away from others. Apparently, every one of them believes it is the most important.

name: empoleon
pokedexEntry: The three horns that extend from its beak attest to its power. The leader has the biggest horns.

name: starly
pokedexEntry: They flock in great numbers. Though small, they flap their wings with great power.

name: staravia
pokedexEntry: It flies around forests and fields in search of bug Pokémon. It stays within a huge flock.

name: staraptor
pokedexEntry: It has a savage nature. It will courageously challenge foes that are much larger.

name: bidoof
pokedexEntry: A comparison revealed that Bidoof’s front teeth grow at the same rate as Rattata’s.

name: bibarel
pokedexEntry: It makes its nest by damming streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker.

name: kricketot
pokedexEntry: It shakes its head back to front, causing its antennae to hit each other and sound like a xylophone.

name: kricketune
pokedexEntry: It crosses its knifelike arms in front of its chest when it cries. It can compose melodies ad lib.

name: shinx
pokedexEntry: All of its fur dazzles if danger is sensed. It flees while the foe is momentarily blinded.

name: luxio
pokedexEntry: Its claws loose electricity with enough amperage to cause fainting. They live in small groups.

name: luxray
pokedexEntry: It has eyes that can see through anything. It spots and captures prey hiding behind objects.

name: budew
pokedexEntry: Over the winter, it closes its bud and endures the cold. In spring, the bud opens and releases pollen.

name: roserade
pokedexEntry: It attracts prey with a sweet aroma, then downs it with thorny whips hidden in its arms.

name: cranidos
pokedexEntry: It lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its skull is as hard as iron.

name: rampardos
pokedexEntry: Its powerful head butt has enough power to shatter even the most durable things upon impact.

name: shieldon
pokedexEntry: A Pokémon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its facial hide is extremely hard.

name: bastiodon
pokedexEntry: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.

name: burmy
pokedexEntry: To shelter itself from cold, wintry winds, it covers itself with a cloak made of twigs and leaves.

name: wormadam-plant
pokedexEntry: When BURMY evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.

name: mothim
pokedexEntry: It loves the honey of flowers and steals honey collected by COMBEE.

name: combee
pokedexEntry: A Pokémon formed by three others. It busily carries sweet floral honey to VESPIQUEN.

name: vespiquen
pokedexEntry: Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by COMBEE.

name: pachirisu
pokedexEntry: It makes fur balls that crackle with static electricity. It stores them with berries in tree holes.

name: buizel
pokedexEntry: It has a flotation sac that is like an inflatable collar. It floats on water with its head out.

name: floatzel
pokedexEntry: It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people.

name: cherubi
pokedexEntry: The small ball holds the nutrients needed for evolution. Apparently, it is very sweet and tasty.

name: cherrim
pokedexEntry: It blooms during times of strong sunlight. It tries to make up for everything it endured as a bud.

name: shellos
pokedexEntry: Its colors and shapes differ from region to region. In the Sinnoh region, two types are confirmed.

name: gastrodon
pokedexEntry: It has a pliable body without any bones. If any part of its body is torn off, it grows right back.

name: ambipom
pokedexEntry: To eat, it deftly shucks nuts with its two tails. It rarely uses its arms now.

name: drifloon
pokedexEntry: A Pokémon formed by the spirits of people and Pokémon. It loves damp, humid seasons.

name: drifblim
pokedexEntry: It’s drowzy in daytime, but flies off in the evening in big groups. No one knows where they go.

name: buneary
pokedexEntry: It slams foes by sharply uncoiling its rolled ears. It stings enough to make a grown-up cry in pain.

name: lopunny
pokedexEntry: An extremely cautious Pokémon. It cloaks its body with its fluffy ear fur when it senses danger.

name: mismagius
pokedexEntry: Its cries sound like incantations. Those hearing it are tormented by headaches and hallucinations.

name: honchkrow
pokedexEntry: Becoming active at night, it is known to swarm with numerous MURKROW in tow.

name: glameow
pokedexEntry: It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness is very popular among some.

name: purugly
pokedexEntry: It is a brazen brute that barges its way into another Pokémon’s nest and claims it as its own.

name: chingling
pokedexEntry: It emits cries by agitating an orb at the back of its throat. It moves with flouncing hops.

name: stunky
pokedexEntry: It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.

name: skuntank
pokedexEntry: It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from the tip of its tail to attack. Its range is over 160 feet.

name: bronzor
pokedexEntry: Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related.

name: bronzong
pokedexEntry: One caused a news sensation when it was dug up at a construction site after a 2,000-year sleep.

name: bonsly
pokedexEntry: It looks as if it is always crying. It is actually adjusting its body’s fluid levels by eliminating excess.

name: mime-jr
pokedexEntry: In an attempt to confuse its enemy, it mimics the enemy’s movements. Then it wastes no time in making itself scarce!

name: happiny
pokedexEntry: It loves round white things. It carries an egg-shaped rock in imitation of CHANSEY.

name: chatot
pokedexEntry: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.

name: spiritomb
pokedexEntry: A Pokémon that was formed by 108 spirits. It is bound to a fissure in an odd keystone.

name: gible
pokedexEntry: It nests in small, horizontal holes in cave walls. It pounces to catch prey that stray too close.

name: gabite
pokedexEntry: There is a long-held belief that medicine made from its scales will heal even incurable illnesses.

name: garchomp
pokedexEntry: When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.

name: munchlax
pokedexEntry: It wolfs down its weight in food once a day, swallowing food whole with almost no chewing.

name: riolu
pokedexEntry: The aura that emanates from its body intensifies to alert others if it is afraid or sad.

name: lucario
pokedexEntry: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.

name: hippopotas
pokedexEntry: It lives in arid places. Instead of perspiration, it expels grainy sand from its body.

name: hippowdon
pokedexEntry: It blasts internally stored sand from ports on its body to create a towering twister for attack.

name: skorupi
pokedexEntry: It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes.

name: drapion
pokedexEntry: It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.

name: croagunk
pokedexEntry: Its cheeks hold poison sacs. It tries to catch foes off guard to jab them with toxic fingers.

name: toxicroak
pokedexEntry: Its knuckle claws secrete a toxin so vile that even a scratch could prove fatal.

name: carnivine
pokedexEntry: It attracts prey with its sweet- smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.

name: finneon
pokedexEntry: After long exposure to sunlight, the patterns on its tail fins shine vividly when darkness arrives.

name: lumineon
pokedexEntry: It lives on the deep-sea floor. It attracts prey by flashing the patterns on its four tail fins.

name: mantyke
pokedexEntry: A friendly Pokémon that captures the subtle flows of seawater using its two antennae.

name: snover
pokedexEntry: It lives on snowy mountains. Having had little contact with humans, it is boldly inquisitive.

name: abomasnow
pokedexEntry: It whips up blizzards in mountains that are always buried in snow. It is the abominable snowman.

name: weavile
pokedexEntry: They communicate by clawing signs in boulders and work together to surround enemies.

name: magnezone
pokedexEntry: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.

name: lickilicky
pokedexEntry: It wraps things with its extensible tongue. Getting too close to it will leave you soaked with drool.

name: rhyperior
pokedexEntry: It puts rocks in holes in its palms and uses its muscles to shoot them. GEODUDE are shot at rare times.

name: tangrowth
pokedexEntry: It ensnares prey by extending arms made of vines. Losing arms to predators does not trouble it.

name: electivire
pokedexEntry: It pushes the tips of its two tails against the foe, then lets loose with over 20,000 volts of power.

name: magmortar
pokedexEntry: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees F from the ends of its arms. It lives in volcanic craters.

name: togekiss
pokedexEntry: It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently.

name: yanmega
pokedexEntry: By churning its wings, it creates shock waves that inflict critical internal injuries to foes.

name: leafeon
pokedexEntry: Just like a plant, it uses photosynthesis. As a result, it is always enveloped in clear air.

name: glaceon
pokedexEntry: As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles.

name: gliscor
pokedexEntry: It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops!

name: mamoswine
pokedexEntry: Its impressive tusks are made of ice. The population thinned when it turned warm after the ice age.

name: porygon-z
pokedexEntry: Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokémon. It began acting oddly, however.

name: gallade
pokedexEntry: A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows.

name: probopass
pokedexEntry: It freely controls three units called Mini-Noses using magnetic force.

name: dusknoir
pokedexEntry: The antenna on its head captures radio waves from the world of spirits that command it to take people there.

name: froslass
pokedexEntry: It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees F. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.

name: rotom
pokedexEntry: Research continues on this Pokémon, which could be the power source of a unique motor.

name: uxie
pokedexEntry: Known as “The Being of Knowledge.” It is said that it can wipe out the memory of those who see its eyes.

name: mesprit
pokedexEntry: Known as “The Being of Emotion.” It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.

name: azelf
pokedexEntry: It is thought that Uxie, Mesprit, and Azelf all came from the same egg.

name: dialga
pokedexEntry: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.

name: palkia
pokedexEntry: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.

name: heatran
pokedexEntry: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.

name: regigigas
pokedexEntry: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokémon towed continents with ropes.

name: giratina-altered
pokedexEntry: A Pokémon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery.

name: cresselia
pokedexEntry: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

name: phione
pokedexEntry: A Pokémon that lives in warm seas. It inflates the flotation sac on its head to drift and search for food.

name: manaphy
pokedexEntry: Born on a cold seafloor, it will swim great distances to return to its birthplace.

name: darkrai
pokedexEntry: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.

name: shaymin-land
pokedexEntry: It lives in flower patches and avoids detection by curling up to look like a flowering plant.

name: arceus
pokedexEntry: It is said to have emerged from an egg in a place where there was nothing, then shaped the world.

name: victini
pokedexEntry: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.

name: snivy
pokedexEntry: It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter.

name: servine
pokedexEntry: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip.

name: serperior
pokedexEntry: It can stop its opponents’ movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally.

name: tepig
pokedexEntry: It can deftly dodge its foe’s attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them.

name: pignite
pokedexEntry: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.

name: emboar
pokedexEntry: It has mastered fast and powerful fighting moves. It grows a beard of fire.

name: oshawott
pokedexEntry: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.

name: dewott
pokedexEntry: Strict training is how it learns its flowing double-scalchop technique.

name: samurott
pokedexEntry: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.

name: patrat
pokedexEntry: Using food stored in cheek pouches, they can keep watch for days. They use their tails to communicate with others.

name: watchog
pokedexEntry: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.

name: lillipup
pokedexEntry: It faces strong opponents with great courage. But, when at a disadvantage in a fight, this intelligent Pokémon flees.

name: herdier
pokedexEntry: It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.

name: stoutland
pokedexEntry: It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold.

name: purrloin
pokedexEntry: They steal from people for fun, but their victims can’t help but forgive them. Their deceptively cute act is perfect.

name: liepard
pokedexEntry: These Pokémon vanish and appear unexpectedly. Many Trainers are drawn to their beautiful form and fur.

name: pansage
pokedexEntry: This Pokémon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic.

name: simisage
pokedexEntry: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

name: pansear
pokedexEntry: When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries.

name: simisear
pokedexEntry: It loves sweets because they become energy for the fire burning inside its body.

name: panpour
pokedexEntry: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.

name: simipour
pokedexEntry: The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail.

name: munna
pokedexEntry: Munna always float in the air. People whose dreams are eaten by them forget what the dreams had been about.

name: musharna
pokedexEntry: The mist emanating from their foreheads is packed with the dreams of people and Pokémon.

name: pidove
pokedexEntry: Each follows its Trainer’s orders as best it can, but they sometimes fail to understand complicated commands.

name: tranquill
pokedexEntry: It can return to its Trainer’s location regardless of the distance separating them.

name: unfezant
pokedexEntry: Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females’ flying abilities surpass those of the males.

name: blitzle
pokedexEntry: Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use their flashing manes to communicate with one another.

name: zebstrika
pokedexEntry: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

name: roggenrola
pokedexEntry: Its ear is hexagonal in shape. Compressed underground, its body is as hard as steel.

name: boldore
pokedexEntry: When it overflows with power, the orange crystal on its body glows. It looks for underground water in caves.

name: gigalith
pokedexEntry: Compressing the energy from its internal core lets it fire off an attack capable of blowing away a mountain.

name: woobat
pokedexEntry: Its habitat is dark forests and caves. It emits ultrasonic waves from its nose to learn about its surroundings.

name: swoobat
pokedexEntry: It emits sound waves of various frequencies from its nose, including some powerful enough to destroy rocks.

name: drilbur
pokedexEntry: It can dig through the ground at a speed of 30 mph. It could give a car running aboveground a good race.

name: excadrill
pokedexEntry: It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel strong enough to bore through iron plates.

name: audino
pokedexEntry: It touches others with the feelers on its ears, using the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling.

name: timburr
pokedexEntry: It fights by swinging a piece of lumber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty.

name: gurdurr
pokedexEntry: This Pokémon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.

name: conkeldurr
pokedexEntry: It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago.

name: tympole
pokedexEntry: They warn others of danger by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound.

name: palpitoad
pokedexEntry: When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.

name: seismitoad
pokedexEntry: They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.

name: throh
pokedexEntry: When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts.

name: sawk
pokedexEntry: The sound of Sawk punching boulders and trees can be heard all the way from the mountains where they train.

name: sewaddle
pokedexEntry: Leavanny dress it in clothes they made for it when it hatched. It hides its head in its hood while it is sleeping.

name: swadloon
pokedexEntry: Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life.

name: leavanny
pokedexEntry: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk.

name: venipede
pokedexEntry: Its bite injects a potent poison, enough to paralyze large bird Pokémon that try to prey on it.

name: whirlipede
pokedexEntry: Protected by a hard shell, it spins its body like a wheel and crashes furiously into its enemies.

name: scolipede
pokedexEntry: With quick movements, it chases down its foes, attacking relentlessly with its horns until it prevails.

name: cottonee
pokedexEntry: When attacked, it escapes by shooting cotton from its body. The cotton serves as a decoy to distract the attacker.

name: whimsicott
pokedexEntry: Like the wind, it can slip through any gap, no matter how small. It leaves balls of white fluff behind.

name: petilil
pokedexEntry: The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body.

name: lilligant
pokedexEntry: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.

name: basculin-red-striped
pokedexEntry: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they’ll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.

name: sandile
pokedexEntry: They live buried in the sands of the desert. The sun-warmed sands prevent their body temperature from dropping.

name: krokorok
pokedexEntry: They live in groups of a few individuals. Protective membranes shield their eyes from sandstorms.

name: krookodile
